The '''Mephout''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] originating in the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Mephout system/Legends|Mephout system]]. In the Mephout society, all [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] duties were handled by the [[Gender/Legends|females]] of the species. The [[RST Model Translator Droid]]s, [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Translator droid/Legends|automatons]] designed in the image of female Mephout, handled nearly all translating duties throughout the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] known as the [[Mephout Dominion/Legends|Mephout Dominion]] until its discovery by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Mephout was a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that had two [[Gender/Legends|sexes]]: male and female. Male Mephout had [[Reproduction/Legends|libidos]] that tended to flare in inopportune situations. The [[RST Model Translator Droid]]s, which were created by the Mephout in the female image, had 1.5-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-tall [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] bodies with two four-fingered [[Limb/Legends|arms]], two legs, a torso with a pair of prominent [[Breast/Legends|breasts]], and a head with two visual and two audial [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] as well as a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]].<ref name="Journal11" />

==Society and culture==
The Mephout originated in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Mephout system/Legends|Mephout system]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the isolated<ref name="Journal11" /> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Sector/Legends|sector]] known as the [[Mephout Dominion/Legends|Mephout Dominion]]. The nature of the Mephout males' libidos led to the species delegating all [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] positions to the females of the species. Correspondingly, the Mephout designed the RST Model Translator Droids, which were manufactured by the [[Plintep Cybernetics Corporation]], to resemble Mephout females, as well.<ref name="Journal11" />

==Mephout in the galaxy==
[[File:Rusti.jpg|thumb|right|300px|RST Model Translator Droids, such as 42-RST (pictured), were created in the image of female Mephout.]]
The RST model [[Translator droid/Legends|droids]] carried out nearly all translating duties throughout the Mephout Dominion until the sector's discovery by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. By that point, in contrast to the RST model [[Droid/Legends|droids]], the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] available in the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] were capable of not just translating but also interpreting cultural nuances. This factor, combined with the fact that the RST models had caused numerous problems during important government functions due to being highly susceptible to [[Electromagnetic pulse/Legends|electromagnetic pulses]], led to the rapid replacement of the Mephout-designed translator droids by protocol droids. As an ostensible reward for services rendered by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] cargo [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Bungo Bung]], the Mephout gifted the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] with the RST Model Translator Droid [[42-RST]]; however, in reality, they simply viewed it as a way to dispose of a droid that had become obsolete.<ref name="Journal11" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Mephout were mentioned in the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' statistics included with the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story "[[Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out]]," which was authored by [[James Anderson|Jim Anderson]] and published in the [[November]] [[1996]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|eleventh issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.<ref name="Journal11" />
